Why your donation matters

Every pound reminds someone they have not been forgotten.

Your donation helps NBCC provide thoughtful gifts, essential support and moments of comfort, dignity and joy for people who may otherwise go without at Christmas.

Donations also help cover the essential costs of running the charity, so we can keep reaching those who need us year after year.

About us

Powered by kindness, driven by community.

The Night Before Christmas Campaign is a volunteer run charity in Annbank, Ayrshire, supporting children, young people and vulnerable adults across South West Scotland, from Girvan to Largs.

Our story

“Do all children get a Christmas Eve box like I do?”

Tygan, age twelve, Annbank, 2015

That single question, asked of her mum Jodie (our Head Elf) and her gran Isabella, became the Night Before Christmas Campaign. The answer was no, not every child wakes up to the magic of Christmas, and the three of them set out to change that.

In their first year they delivered 90 boxes filled with love and gifts. Seeing people sleeping rough on a cold morning in Glasgow pushed them to do more, and to register as a charity. From 593 bags to more than 7,000, the campaign has grown every year, and so has the need.

The story continues, and you can be part of it.

The elves behind NBCC

Why your donation matters

Real impact. Real difference.

Your donation helps NBCC provide thoughtful gifts, essential support and moments of comfort, dignity and joy for people who may otherwise go without at Christmas. Donations also help cover the essential costs of running the charity, so we can keep reaching those who need us year after year.

Donate now →
Donate

Your gift becomes someone's Christmas.

Everyone involved in NBCC is a volunteer, so your kindness goes straight to thoughtful gifts and moments of joy. Around £50 is the value of one Red Bag Full of Joy. Give once, or give monthly and support the work all year round.

Want a different monthly amount? Email us →

Payments are processed securely by Stripe. Card and Direct Debit are both accepted. You will be taken to a secure page to complete your donation.

Where it goes
  • Thoughtful gifts and essential support, not salaries
  • The essential costs of keeping the charity running
  • Reaching children, young people and vulnerable adults in hardship
Registered Scottish charity SC047995
CardDirect DebitApple PayGoogle Pay
A thank you for monthly donors

What monthly donors receive

All monthly donors

  • Your name, or your business name, added to our Donors Page, unless you choose to remain anonymous.
  • A post Christmas end of year impact update, keeping you in the loop on the difference your support has helped make.

Platinum donors also receive

  • A special thank you on our social media channels, celebrating your generous ongoing support.
  • An optional digital supporter badge for your website, ideal for businesses.
  • A personalised supporter certificate, printed and posted, or sent digitally.

Cancel any time

Monthly donations can be changed or cancelled whenever you like. Direct Debits are protected by the Direct Debit Guarantee.

Secure and simple

Donations are handled by Stripe. Monthly giving should be set up by adults aged 18 or over.

Need a hand?

Any problems, contact Jaimie Wakefield at giving@nightbeforechristmas.co.uk or 01292 811 015.

Contact

We'd love to hear from you.

A question, an offer of help, a fundraising idea or a referral enquiry, whatever it is, the elves will get back to you.
